description: Worker mode: Engine uses gRPC when grpc_endpoint is configured
detail: In _init_components(), when mode=worker and grpc_endpoint is set, create Engine(mode='grpc', grpc_endpoint=..., fallback_mode='auto') instead of Engine(mode='local')
Wrap self._try_grpc_with_fallback('list_repos') — already exists in Rust EngineApi trait and GrpcEngineClient
Calls engine.list_repos() to get repo_ids, sets self._repo_ids, returns self for chaining

description: Add search_across_repos(query) convenience method to Worker
detail: Uses self._engine.search() with the query — engine now routes to gRPC when available
